channel.title: Dry-Type Transformers on Zan
channel.description: Recent content in Dry-Type Transformers on Zan

item.title: SCB13 Cast Resin Dry-Type Transformer
item.description: The SCB13 series uses cast resin insulation with flame-retardant structure, making it a practical choice for hospitals, schools, malls, and manufacturing facilities where safety and reliability are critical. It helps reduce no-load loss and operating noise while supporting stable power quality and lower lifecycle operating cost.

item.title: SCB14 Cast Resin Dry-Type Transformer
item.description: Compared with earlier generations, the SCB14 series further optimizes loss control and thermal performance for demanding duty cycles. It is well suited for data centers, transit infrastructure, and high-rise commercial buildings that require stable continuous operation, energy savings, and dependable distribution resilience.

item.title: SCBH15 Cast Resin Dry-Type Transformer
item.description: The SCBH15H series is designed for users prioritizing strict energy targets and long-term cost reduction. Its amorphous alloy core significantly lowers no-load loss, while cast resin insulation provides flame-retardant, low-maintenance operation. It is ideal for green buildings, utility upgrades, and renewable-energy supporting distribution systems.
